reviews.comment:
La cafetería muy buena, pero los baños terribles! Antes, cuando era más sencillo, más viejito, estaba más limpio!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The cafeteria is very good, but the bathrooms are terrible! Before, when it was simpler and older, it was cleaner!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzaE82cG5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Está bien, no es óptima la limpieza de los baños, y no deberían permitir perros sueltos

(Translated by Google)
Okay, the cleanliness of the bathrooms isn't optimal, and they shouldn't allow dogs off-leash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHNmZmLTR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio, tranquilo, para descansar un rato y seguir la ruta

(Translated by Google)
Very clean, quiet, a good place to rest for a while and continue the route
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcWZIa1NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene zona de bosque, venden quesos y salames caseros que la rompen, estación limpia, baños 10 puntos. Lo mejor entre mdq y  Caba.

(Translated by Google)
It has a wooded area, they sell amazing homemade cheeses and salamis, the station is clean, and the bathrooms are top-notch. The best option between Mar del Plata and Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHcVlUQzhRRRAB

It doesn't issue an invoice when you use the app to pay.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en el bar para tomar un café con leche y unas medialunas para desayunar camino a Mar del Plata. Muy buena onda y agilidad ahi y en los surtidores.
Los baños muy limpios y con todo lo necesario.
Recomiendo 100%

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the bar for a coffee and croissants for breakfast on the way to Mar del Plata. Very friendly and efficient staff there and at the gas pumps.
The restrooms were very clean and had everything you need. 100% recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHOGJiMDd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente !! Baños impecables y muchos . Atención en cafetería también.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! Spotless and plentiful bathrooms. Great service in the cafeteria too.
